\\n250: \\ts.logger.Debug(\\\"default rollout matched\\\", zap.Bool(\\\"enabled\\\", flag.Enabled))\\n251: \\treturn resp, nil\\n252: }\\n253: \\n254: // Batch takes in a list of \t\t\t\tif len(rollout.Segment.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n231: \t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n232: \t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n233: \t\t\t\t}\n234: \t\t\t}\n235: \n236: (s *Server) boolean(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\trollouts, err := 0\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys    = []string{}\n\t\t\t)\n\n\t\t\tfor k, v := range rollout.Segment.Segments {\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys = append(segmentKeys, k)\n\t\t\t\tmatched, reason, err := flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif len(rollout.Segment.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Segment.Value\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"segment based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.Strings(\"segments\", segmentKeys))\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// If we have exhausted all rollouts and we still don't have a match, return flag enabled value.\n\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tresp.Enabled = flag.Enabled\n\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"default rollout matched\", zap.Bool(\"enabled\", flag.Enabled))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// Batch takes in a list of !e.matchConstraintExpressions(r.Context, constraint) {\n\t\t\t\t// TODO(evanb) add match debug context\n\t\t\t\tgoto next_rule\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tfor key, variant := range rule.Segments {\n\t\t\t// TODO(chriscchapman) return all matching distributions\n\t\t\tif dist, ok := variant[\"default\"]; ok {\n\t\t\t\tresp.Match = true\n\t\t\t\tresp.SegmentKey = key\n\t\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\t\tresp.Value = dist.VariantKey\n\t\t\t\tresp.Attachment = dist.VariantAttachment\n\t\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\tnext_rule:\n\t}\n\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (e *Evaluator) matchConstraintExpressions(cxt json.RawMessage, cs flipt.Distribution) bool {\n\tif len(cs) == 0 {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tvar request map[string]interface{}\n\tif err := json.Unmarshal(cxt, &request); err != nil {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, c := range cs {\n\t\tif !e.matchConstraint(request, c) {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn true\n}\n\nfunc (e *Evaluator) matchConstraint(ctx map[string]interface{}, c *flipt.Constraint) bool {\n\tproperty, ok := ctx[c.Property]\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tif c.Operator == \"empty\" {\n\t\tswitch v := property.(type) {\n\t\tcase string:\n\t\t\treturn v == \"\"\n\t\tcase float64:\n\t\t\treturn v == 0\n\t\tcase bool:\n\t\t\treturn !v\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tif c.Operator == \"not_empty\" {\n\t\tswitch v := property.(type) {\n\t\tcase string:\n\t\t\treturn v != \"\"\n\t\tcase float64:\n\t\t\treturn v != 0\n\t\tcase bool:\n\t\t\treturn v\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tswitch v := property.(type) {\n\tcase string:\n\t\treturn e.matchConstraintString(v, c)\n\tcase float64:\n\t\treturn e.matchConstraintNumber(v, c)\n\tcase bool:\n\t\treturn e.matchConstraintBoolean(v, c)\n\t}\n\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc (e *Evaluator) matchConstraintString(value string, c *flipt.Constraint) bool {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase \"eq\":\n\t\treturn value == c.Value\n\tcase \"neq\":\n\t\treturn value != c.Value\n\tcase \"prefix\":\n\t\treturn strings.HasPrefix(value, c.Value)\n\tcase \"suffix\":\n\t\treturn strings.HasSuffix(value, c.Value)\n\tcase \"like\":\n\t\treturn strings.Contains(value, c.Value)\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc (e *Evaluator) matchConstraintNumber(value float64, c *flipt.Constraint) bool {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase \"eq\":\n\t\tval, err := strconv.ParseFloat(c.Value, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn value == val\n\tcase \"neq\":\n\t\tval, err := strconv.ParseFloat(c.Value, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn value != val\n\tcase \"lt\":\n\t\tval, err := strconv.ParseFloat(c.Value, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn value < val\n\tcase \"lte\":\n\t\tval, err := strconv.ParseFloat(c.Value, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn value <= val\n\tcase \"gt\":\n\t\tval, err := strconv.ParseFloat(c.Value, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn value > val\n\tcase \"gte\":\n\t\tval, err := strconv.ParseFloat(c.Value, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn value >= val\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc (e *Evaluator) matchConstraintBoolean(value bool, c *flipt.Constraint) bool {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase \"true\":\n\t\treturn value\n\tcase \"false\":\n\t\treturn !value\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc (e *Evaluator) matchConstraints(requestContext json.RawMessage, constraints []storage.EvaluationConstraint, matchType flipt.MatchType, entityId string) (bool, string, error) {\n\tvar request map[string]interface{}\n\tif err := json.Unmarshal(requestContext, &request); err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, \"\", err\n\t}\n\n\t// add entityId to the request context\n\trequest[\"entityId\"] = entityId\n\n\tif len(constraints) == 0 {\n\t\treturn true, \"no constraints to match\", nil\n\t}\n\n\tmatchedConstraints := 0\n\n\tfor _, constraint := range constraints {\n\t\tvar op string\n\n\t\tswitch constraint.Operator {\n\t\tcase \"IPs\":\n\t\t\top = \"in\"\n\t\tcase \"not IPs\":\n\t\t\top = \"not_in\"\n\t\tcase \"contains\":\n\t\t\top = \"in\"\n\t\tcase \"not contains\":\n\t\t\top = \"not_in\"\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\top = constraint.Operator\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch matchType {\n\t\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\t\tif e.matchConstraint(request, constraint, op) {\n\t\t\t\tmatchedConstraints++\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\t\tif e.matchConstraint(request, constraint, op) {\n\t\t\t\treturn true, fmt.Sprintf(\"matched constraint %q\", constraint.Property), nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tswitch matchType {\n\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\tif matchedConstraints == len(constraints) {\n\t\t\tvar properties []string\n\t\t\tfor _, c := range constraints {\n\t\t\t\tproperties = append(properties, c.Property)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tsort.Strings(properties)\n\t\t\treturn true, fmt.Sprintf(\"matched all constraints %q\", properties), nil\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, \"did not match constraints\", nil\n}\n\nfunc (e *Evaluator) matchConstraint(ctx map[string]interface{}, constraint storage.EvaluationConstraint, op string) bool {\n\tvalue, ok := ctx[constraint.Property]\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tcontextValue := fmt.Sprint(value)\n\n\tswitch op {\n\tcase \"eq\":\n\t\treturn contextValue == constraint.Value\n\tcase \"neq\":\n\t\treturn contextValue != constraint.Value\n\tcase \"lt\":\n\t\tv, err := strconv.ParseFloat(contextValue, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\tcv, err := strconv.ParseFloat(constraint.Value, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn v < cv\n\tcase \"lte\":\n\t\tv, err := strconv.ParseFloat(contextValue, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\tcv, err := strconv.ParseFloat(constraint.Value, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn v <= cv\n\tcase \"gt\":\n\t\tv, err := strconv.ParseFloat(contextValue, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\tcv, err := strconv.ParseFloat(constraint.Value, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn v > cv\n\tcase \"gte\":\n\t\tv, err := strconv.ParseFloat(contextValue, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\tcv, err := strconv.ParseFloat(constraint.Value, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn v >= cv\n\tcase \"prefix\":\n\t\treturn strings.HasPrefix(contextValue, constraint.Value)\n\tcase \"suffix\":\n\t\treturn strings.HasSuffix(contextValue, constraint.Value)\n\tcase \"like\":\n\t\treturn strings.Contains(contextValue, constraint.Value)\n\tcase \"in\":\n\t\treturn slices.Contains(strings.Split(constraint.Value, \",\"), contextValue)\n\tcase \"not_in\":\n\t\treturn !slices.Contains(strings.Split(constraint.Value, \",\"), contextValue)\n\t}\n\n\treturn false\n}\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null}}

flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif len(rollout.Segment.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL exhausted all rollouts and we still don't have a match, return flag enabled value.\n\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tresp.Enabled = flag.Enabled\n\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"default rollout matched\", zap.Bool(\"enabled\", flag.Enabled))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// Batch takes in a list of err\n\t}\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"boolean\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tif flag.Type != flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE {\n\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"flag type %s invalid\", flag.Type)\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := s.boolean(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(strconv.FormatBool(resp.Enabled)),\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"boolean\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) boolean(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\trollouts, err := s.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, flag.Key, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tresp = &rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\tRequestId: r.RequestId,\n\t\t}\n\t\tlastRank int32\n\t)\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tstartTime     = time.Now().UTC()\n\t\tnamespaceAttr = metrics.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey)\n\t\tflagAttr      = metrics.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey)\n\t)\n\n\tmetrics.EvaluationsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, 1,\n\t\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeType.String(\"boolean\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t} flagAttr)))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tmetrics.EvaluationLatency.Record(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tfloat64(time.Since(startTime).Nanoseconds())/1e6,\n\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t}()\n\n\tfor _, rollout := range rollouts {\n\t\tif rollout.Rank < lastRank {\n\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"rollout rank: %d detected out of order\", rollout.Rank)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlastRank = rollout.Rank\n\n\t\tif rollout.Threshold != nil {\n\t\t\t// consistent hashing based on the entity id and flag key.\n\t\t\thash := crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(r.EntityId + r.FlagKey))\n\n\t\t\tnormalizedValue := float32(int(hash) % 100)\n\n\t\t\t// if this case does not hold, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\tif normalizedValue < rollout.Threshold.Percentage {\n\t\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Threshold.Value\n\t\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"threshold based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.String(\"rollout_type\", \"threshold\"))\n\t\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else if rollout.Segment != nil {\n\n\t\t\tvar (\n\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches = 0\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys    = []string{}\n\t\t\t)\n\n\t\t\tfor k, v := range rollout.Segment.Segments {\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys = append(segmentKeys, k)\n\t\t\t\tmatched, reason, err := s.evaluator.matchConstraints(r.Context, v.Constraints, v.MatchType, r.EntityId)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t// if we don't match the segment, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\t\tif matched {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(reason)\n\t\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches++\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tswitch rollout.Segment.SegmentOperator {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif len(rollout.Segment.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Segment.Value\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"segment based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.Strings(\"segments\", segmentKeys))\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// If we have exhausted all rollouts and we still don't have a match, return flag enabled value.\n\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tresp.Enabled = flag.Enabled\n\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"default rollout matched\", zap.Bool(\"enabled\", flag.Enabled))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// Batch takes in a list of *evaluation.EvaluationRequest and returns their respective responses.\nfunc (s *Server) Batch(ctx context.Context, b *rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse, matchConstraints is a utility function that will return if all or any constraints have matched for a segment depending\n// on the match type.\nfunc (e *Evaluator) matchConstraints(evalCtx map[string]string, constraints []storage.EvaluationConstraint, segmentMatchType flipt.MatchType, entityId string) (bool, string, error) {\n\tconstraintMatches := 0\n\n\tvar reason string\n\n\tfor _, c := range constraints {\n\t\tv := evalCtx[c.Property]\n\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tmatch bool\n\t\t\terr   error\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tswitch c.Type {\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch = matchesString(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesNumber(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesBool(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_DATETIME_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesDateTime(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch = matchesString(c, entityId)\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\treturn false, reason, errs.ErrInvalid(\"unknown constraint type\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"error matching constraint\", zap.String(\"property\", c.Property), zap.Error(err))\n\t\t\t// don't return here because we want to continue to evaluate the other constraints\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif match {\n\t\t\t// increase the matchCount\n\t\t\tconstraintMatches++\n\n\t\t\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\t\t\t// can short circuit here since we had at least one match\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\t// keep looping as we need to match all constraints\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t// no match\n\t\t\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\t\t\t// we can short circuit because we must match all constraints\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\t// keep looping to see if we match the next constraint\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tvar matched = true\n\n\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\tif len(constraints) != constraintMatches {\n\t\t\treason = \"did not match ALL constraints\"\n\t\t\tmatched = false\n\t\t}\n\n\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\tif len(constraints) > 0 && constraintMatches == 0 {\n\t\t\treason = \"did not match ANY constraints\"\n\t\t\tmatched = false\n\t\t}\n\tdefault:\n\t\treason = fmt.Sprintf(\"unknown match type %d\", segmentMatchType)\n\t\tmatched = false\n\t}\n\n\treturn matched, reason, nil\n}\n\nfunc crc32Num(entityID string, salt string) uint {\n\treturn uint(crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(salt+entityID))) % totalBucketNum\n}\n\nconst (\n\t// totalBucketNum represents how many buckets we can use to determine the consistent hashing\n\t// distribution and rollout\n\ttotalBucketNum uint = 1000\n\n\t// percentMultiplier implies that the multiplier between percentage (100) and totalBucketNum\n\tpercentMultiplier float32 = float32(totalBucketNum) / 100\n)\n\nfunc matchesString(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) bool {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEmpty:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0\n\tcase flipt.OpNotEmpty:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0\n\t}\n\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tvalue := c.Value\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n\t\treturn value == v\n\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n\t\treturn value != v\n\tcase flipt.OpPrefix:\n\t\treturn strings.HasPrefix(strings.TrimSpace(v), value)\n\tcase flipt.OpSuffix:\n\t\treturn strings.HasSuffix(strings.TrimSpace(v), value)\n\tcase flipt.OpIsOneOf:\n\t\tvalues := []string{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn slices.Contains(values, v)\n\tcase flipt.OpIsNotOneOf:\n\t\tvalues := []string{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn !slices.Contains(values, v)\n\t}\n\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc matchesNumber(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// can't parse an empty string\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false, nil\n\t}\n\n\tn, err := strconv.ParseFloat(v, 64)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing number from %q\", v)\n\t}\n\n\tif c.Operator == flipt.OpIsOneOf {\n\t\tvalues := []float64{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(c.Value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"Invalid value for constraint %q\", c.Value)\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn slices.Contains(values, n), nil\n\t} else if c.Operator == flipt.OpIsNotOneOf {\n\t\tvalues := []float64{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(c.Value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"Invalid value for constraint %q\", c.Value)\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn !slices.Contains(values, n), nil\n\t}\n\n\t// TODO: we should consider parsing this at creation time since it doesn't change and it doesnt make sense to allow invalid constraint values\n\tvalue, err := strconv.ParseFloat(c.Value, 64)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing number from %q\", c.Value)\n\t}\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n\t\treturn value == n, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n\t\treturn value != n, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLT:\n\t\treturn n < value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLTE:\n\t\treturn n <= value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGT:\n\t\treturn n > value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGTE:\n\t\treturn n >= value, nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, nil\n}\n\nfunc matchesBool(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// can't parse an empty string\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false, nil\n\t}\n\n\tvalue, err := strconv.ParseBool(v)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing boolean from %q\", v)\n\t}\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpTrue:\n\t\treturn value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpFalse:\n\t\treturn !value, nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, nil\n}\n\nfunc matchesDateTime(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// can't parse an empty string\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false, nil\n\t}\n\n\td, err := tryParseDateTime(v)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, err\n\t}\n\n\tvalue, err := tryParseDateTime(c.Value)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, err\n\t}\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n\t\treturn value.Equal(d), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n\t\treturn !value.Equal(d), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLT:\n\t\treturn d.Before(value), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLTE:\n\t\treturn d.Before(value) || value.Equal(d), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGT:\n\t\treturn d.After(value), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGTE:\n\t\treturn d.After(value) || value.Equal(d), nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, nil\n}\n\nfunc tryParseDateTime(v string) (time.Time, error) {\n\tif d, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, v); err == nil {\n\t\treturn d.UTC(), nil\n\t}\n\n\tif d, err := time.Parse(time.DateOnly, v); err == nil {\n\t\treturn d.UTC(), nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn time.Time{}, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing datetime from %q\", sql.NullString\n\tName         sql.NullString\n\tDescription  sql.NullString\n\tAttachment   sql.NullString\n\tCreatedAt    fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n\tUpdatedAt    fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n}\n\n// ListFlags lists all flags with variants\nfunc (s *Store) ListFlags(ctx context.Context, req *storage.ListRequest[storage.NamespaceRequest]) (storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Flag], error) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflags   []*flipt.Flag\n\t\tresults = storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Flag]{}\n\n\t\tquery = s.builder.Select(\"namespace_key, \\\"key\\\", \\\"type\\\", name, description, enabled, created_at, updated_at\").\n\t\t\tFrom(\"flags\").\n\t\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": req.Predicate.Namespace()}).\n\t\t\tOrderBy(fmt.Sprintf(\"created_at %s\", req.QueryParams.Order))\n\t)\n\n\tif req.QueryParams.Limit > 0 {\n\t\tquery = query.Limit(req.QueryParams.Limit + 1)\n\t}\n\n\tvar offset uint64\n\n\tif req.QueryParams.PageToken != \"\" {\n\t\ttoken, err := decodePageToken(s.logger, req.QueryParams.PageToken)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn results, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\toffset = token.Offset\n\t\tquery = query.Offset(offset)\n\t} else if req.QueryParams.Offset > 0 {\n\t\toffset = req.QueryParams.Offset\n\t\tquery = query.Offset(offset)\n\t}\n\n\trows, err := query.QueryContext(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn results, err\n\t}\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif cerr := rows.Close(); cerr != nil && err == nil {\n\t\t\terr = cerr\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\t// keep track of flags so we can associated variants in second query.\n\tflagsByKey := make(map[string]*flipt.Flag)\n\tfor rows.Next() {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tflag = &flipt.Flag{}\n\n\t\t\tfCreatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\t\tfUpdatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tif err := rows.Scan(\n\t\t\t&flag.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t&flag.Key,\n\t\t\t&flag.Type,\n\t\t\t&flag.Name,\n\t\t\t&flag.Description,\n\t\t\t&flag.Enabled,\n\t\t\t&fCreatedAt,\n\t\t\t&fUpdatedAt); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn results, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tflag.CreatedAt = fCreatedAt.Timestamp\n\t\tflag.UpdatedAt = fUpdatedAt.Timestamp\n\n\t\tflags = append(flags, flag)\n\t\tflagsByKey[flag.Key] = flag\n\t}\n\n\tif err := rows.Err(); err != nil {\n\t\treturn results, err\n\t}\n\n\tif err := rows.Close(); err != nil {\n\t\treturn results, err\n\t}\n\n\tif err := s.setVariants(ctx, req.Predicate.Namespace(), flagsByKey); err != nil {\n\t\treturn results, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar next *flipt.Flag\n\n\tif len(flags) > int(req.QueryParams.Limit) && req.QueryParams.Limit > 0 {\n\t\tnext = flags[len(flags)-1]\n\t\tflags = flags[:req.QueryParams.Limit]\n\t}\n\n\tresults.Results = flags\n\n\tif next != nil {\n\t\tout, err := json.Marshal(PageToken{Key: next.Key, Offset: offset + uint64(len(flags))})\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn results, fmt.Errorf(\"encoding page token %w\", err)\n\t\t}\n\t\tresults.NextPageToken = base64.StdEncoding.EncodeToString(out)\n\t}\n\n\treturn results, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Store) setVariants(ctx context.Context, namespaceKey string, flagsByKey map[string]*flipt.Flag) error {\n\tallFlagKeys := make([]string, 0, len(flagsByKey))\n\tfor k := range flagsByKey {\n\t\tallFlagKeys = append(allFlagKeys, k)\n\t}\n\n\tquery := s.builder.Select(\"id, namespace_key, \\\"key\\\", flag_key, name, description, attachment, created_at, != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif cerr := rows.Close(); cerr != nil && err == nil {\n\t\t\terr = cerr\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\tfor rows.Next() {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tvariant req.Key}).\n\t\t\tQueryRowContext(ctx).\n\t\t\tScan(\n\t\t\t\t&segment.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\t&segment.Key,\n\t\t\t\t&segment.Name,\n\t\t\t\t&segment.Description,\n\t\t\t\t&segment.MatchType,\n\t\t\t\t&createdAt,\n\t\t\t\t&updatedAt)\n\t)\n\n\tif updated_at\").\n\t\tFrom(\"constraints\").\n\t\tWhere(sq.And{sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": segment.NamespaceKey}, sq.Eq{\"segment_key\": segment.Key}}).\n\t\tOrderBy(\"created_at ASC\")\n\n\trows, err := sql.NullString\n\tNamespaceKey sql.NullString\n\tSegmentKey   sql.NullString\n\tType         sql.NullInt32\n\tProperty     sql.NullString\n\tOperator     sql.NullString\n\tValue ListSegments(ctx context.Context, req *storage.ListRequest[storage.NamespaceRequest]) (storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Segment], error) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tsegments []*flipt.Segment\n\t\tresults  = {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tnamespace := uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String()\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\t_, err := s.store.CreateNamespace(ctx, &flipt.CreateNamespaceRequest{\n\t\tKey: namespace,\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tvar (\n\t\ttotalFlags = 9\n\t\tpageSize   = uint64(3)\n\t)\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < totalFlags; i++ {\n\t\treq := flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespace,\n\t\t\tKey:          fmt.Sprintf(\"flag_%03d\", i),\n\t\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t_, err := s.store.CreateFlag(ctx, &req)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\tfor i := 0; i < 2; i++ {\n\t\t\tif i > 0 && s.db.Driver == fliptsql.MySQL {\n\t\t\t\t// required for MySQL since it only s.stores timestamps to the second and not millisecond granularity\n\t\t\t\ttime.Sleep(time.Second)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t_, err := s.store.CreateVariant(ctx, &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespace,\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      req.Key,\n\t\t\t\tKey:          fmt.Sprintf(\"variant_%d\", i),\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treq := storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(namespace),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithLimit(pageSize),\n\t\t),\n\t)\n\tresp, err := s.store.ListFlags(ctx, req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tfound := resp.Results\n\tfor token := resp.NextPageToken; token != \"\"; token = resp.NextPageToken {\n\t\treq.QueryParams.PageToken = token\n\t\tresp, err = s.store.ListFlags(ctx, req)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\tfound = append(found, resp.Results...)\n\t}\n\n\trequire.Len(t, found, totalFlags)\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < totalFlags; i++ {\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, namespace, found[i].NamespaceKey)\n\n\t\texpectedFlag := fmt.Sprintf(\"flag_%03d\", i)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, expectedFlag, found[i].Key)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", found[i].Name)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", found[i].Description)\n\n\t\trequire.Len(t, found[i].Variants, 2)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, namespace, found[i].Variants[0].NamespaceKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, expectedFlag, found[i].Variants[0].FlagKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"variant_0\", found[i].Variants[0].Key)\n\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, namespace, found[i].Variants[1].NamespaceKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, expectedFlag, found[i].Variants[1].FlagKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"variant_1\", found[i].Variants[1].Key)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestCreateVariant() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: storage.NewResource(storage.DefaultNamespace, flag.Key))\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tassert.Len(t, flag.Variants, 1)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite)     true,\n\t\t})\n\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\t\tattachment := `{\"key\":\"value\"}`\n\t\tvariant, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), *DBTestSuite) TestListFlags() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\treqs := []*flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tKey:         uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tKey:         uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := range reqs {\n\t\t_, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), req)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t}\n\n\t_, err := s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(storage.DefaultNamespace),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](storage.WithPageToken(\"Hello World\"))),\n\t)\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"pageToken is not valid: \\\"Hello World\\\"\")\n\n\tres, err := s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewNamespace(storage.DefaultNamespace)))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot := res.Results\n\tassert.NotZero(t, len(got))\n\n\tfor _, flag := range got {\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, flag.NamespaceKey)\n\t\tassert.NotZero(t, flag.CreatedAt)\n\t\tassert.NotZero(t, flag.UpdatedAt)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestListFlagsNamespace() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\treqs := []*flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\t\tKey:          uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\t\tKey:          uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := range reqs {\n\t\t_, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), req)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t}\n\n\tres, err := TestListFlagsPagination_LimitOffset() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\treqs := []*flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tKey:         uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tKey:         uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tKey:         uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := range reqs {\n\t\tif s.db.Driver == fliptsql.MySQL {\n\t\t\t// required for MySQL since it only s.stores timestamps to the second and not millisecond granularity\n\t\t\ttime.Sleep(time.Second)\n\t\t}\n\t\t_, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), req)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t}\n\n\toldest, middle, newest := reqs[0], reqs[1], reqs[2]\n\n\t// TODO: the ordering (DESC) is required because the default ordering is ASC and we are not clearing the DB between tests\n\t// get middle flag\n\treq := storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(storage.DefaultNamespace),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithOrder(storage.OrderDesc), storage.WithLimit(1), storage.WithOffset(1),\n\t\t),\n\t)\n\tres, err := s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot := res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 1)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, middle.Key, got[0].Key)\n\n\t// get first (newest) flag\n\treq = storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(storage.DefaultNamespace),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithOrder(storage.OrderDesc), storage.WithLimit(1),\n\t\t),\n\t)\n\tres, err = s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot = res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 1)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, newest.Key, got[0].Key)\n\n\t// get last (oldest) flag\n\treq = storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(storage.DefaultNamespace),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithOrder(storage.OrderDesc), storage.WithLimit(1), storage.WithOffset(2),\n\t\t),\n\t)\n\tres, err = s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot = res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 1)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, oldest.Key, got[0].Key)\n\n\t// get all flags\n\treq = storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(storage.DefaultNamespace),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithOrder(storage.OrderDesc),\n\t\t),\n\t)\n\tres, err = s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot = res.Results\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, newest.Key, got[0].Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, middle.Key, got[1].Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, oldest.Key, got[2].Key)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestListFlagsPagination_LimitWithNextPage() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\treqs := []*flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tKey:         uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tKey:         uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tKey:         uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := range reqs {\n\t\tif s.db.Driver == fliptsql.MySQL {\n\t\t\t// required for MySQL since it only s.stores timestamps to the second and not millisecond granularity\n\t\t\ttime.Sleep(time.Second)\n\t\t}\n\t\t_, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), req)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t}\n\n\toldest, middle, newest := reqs[0], reqs[1], reqs[2]\n\n\t// TODO: the ordering (DESC) is required because the default ordering is ASC and we are not clearing the DB between tests\n\t// get newest flag\n\treq := storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(storage.DefaultNamespace),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](storage.WithOrder(storage.OrderDesc), storage.WithLimit(1)),\n\t)\n\tres, err := s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot := res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 1)\n\tassert.Equal(t, newest.Key, got[0].Key)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, res.NextPageToken)\n\n\tpageToken := &common.PageToken{}\n\tpTokenB, err := base64.StdEncoding.DecodeString(res.NextPageToken)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\terr = json.Unmarshal(pTokenB, pageToken)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t// next page should be the middle flag\n\tassert.Equal(t, middle.Key, pageToken.Key)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, pageToken.Offset)\n\n\treq.QueryParams.PageToken = res.NextPageToken\n\n\t// get middle flag\n\tres, err = s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot = res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 1)\n\tassert.Equal(t, middle.Key, got[0].Key)\n\n\tpTokenB, err = base64.StdEncoding.DecodeString(res.NextPageToken)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\n\terr = json.Unmarshal(pTokenB, pageToken)\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t// next page should be the oldest flag\n\tassert.Equal(t, oldest.Key, pageToken.Key)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, pageToken.Offset)\n\n\treq.QueryParams.Limit = 1\n\treq.QueryParams.Order = storage.OrderDesc\n\treq.QueryParams.PageToken = res.NextPageToken\n\n\t// get oldest flag\n\tres, err = s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot = res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 1)\n\tassert.Equal(t, oldest.Key, got[0].Key)\n\n\treq = storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(storage.DefaultNamespace),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithOrder(storage.OrderDesc), storage.WithLimit(3),\n\t\t),\n\t)\n\t// get all flags\n\tres, err = s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot = res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 3)\n\tassert.Equal(t, newest.Key, got[0].Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, middle.Key, got[1].Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, oldest.Key, got[2].Key)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestListFlagsPagination_FullWalk() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tnamespace := uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String()\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\t_, err := s.store.CreateNamespace(ctx, &flipt.CreateNamespaceRequest{\n\t\tKey: namespace,\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tvar (\n\t\ttotalFlags = 9\n\t\tpageSize   = uint64(3)\n\t)\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < totalFlags; i++ {\n\t\treq := flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespace,\n\t\t\tKey:          fmt.Sprintf(\"flag_%03d\", i),\n\t\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t_, err := s.store.CreateFlag(ctx, &req)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\tfor i := 0; i < 2; i++ {\n\t\t\tif i > 0 && s.db.Driver == fliptsql.MySQL {\n\t\t\t\t// required for MySQL since it only s.stores timestamps to the second and not millisecond granularity\n\t\t\t\ttime.Sleep(time.Second)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t_, err := s.store.CreateVariant(ctx, &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespace,\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      req.Key,\n\t\t\t\tKey:          fmt.Sprintf(\"variant_%d\", i),\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treq := storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(namespace),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithLimit(pageSize),\n\t\t),\n\t)\n\tresp, err := s.store.ListFlags(ctx, req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tfound := resp.Results\n\tfor token := resp.NextPageToken; token != \"\"; token = resp.NextPageToken {\n\t\treq.QueryParams.PageToken = token\n\t\tresp, err = s.store.ListFlags(ctx, req)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\tfound = append(found, resp.Results...)\n\t}\n\n\trequire.Len(t, found, totalFlags)\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < totalFlags; i++ {\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, namespace, found[i].NamespaceKey)\n\n\t\texpectedFlag := fmt.Sprintf(\"flag_%03d\", i)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, expectedFlag, found[i].Key)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", found[i].Name)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", found[i].Description)\n\n\t\trequire.Len(t, found[i].Variants, 2)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, namespace, found[i].Variants[0].NamespaceKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, expectedFlag, found[i].Variants[0].FlagKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"variant_0\", found[i].Variants[0].Key)\n\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, namespace, found[i].Variants[1].NamespaceKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, expectedFlag, found[i].Variants[1].FlagKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"variant_1\", found[i].Variants[1].Key)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestCreateVariant() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tattachment := `{\"key\":\"value\"}`\n\tvariant, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:     flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tAttachment:  attachment,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant)\n\n\tassert.NotZero(t, variant.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, variant.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag.Key, variant.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, t.Name(), variant.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", variant.Name)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", variant.Description)\n\tassert.Equal(t, attachment, variant.Attachment)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, variant.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant.CreatedAt.Seconds, variant.UpdatedAt.Seconds)\n\n\t// get the flag again\n\tflag, err = s.store.GetFlag(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(storage.DefaultNamespace, flag.Key))\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tassert.Len(t, flag.Variants, 1)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestCreateVariantNamespace() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tattachment := `{\"key\":\"value\"}`\n\tvariant, err :=     true,\n\t\t})\n\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\t\tattachment := `{\"key\":\"value\"}`\n\t\tvariant, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespace,\n\t\t\tFlagKey:      flag.Key,\n\t\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\t\tAttachment:   attachment,\n\t\t})\n\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\tassert.NotNil(t, variant)\n\n\t\tassert.NotZero(t, variant.Id)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, namespace, variant.Description)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, attachment, variant.Attachment)\n\t\tassert.NotZero(t, variant.CreatedAt)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, variant.CreatedAt.Seconds, variant.UpdatedAt.Seconds)\n\t}\n\n\t// get the default namespaced flag\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(storage.DefaultNamespace, t.Name()))\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, variant.UpdatedAt.Seconds)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestUpdateVariant() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tattachment1 := `{\"key\":\"value1\"}`\n\tvariant, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:     flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:         \"foo\",\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tAttachment:  attachment1,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant)\n\n\tassert.NotZero(t, variant.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, variant.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag.Key, variant.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", variant.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", variant.Name)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", variant.Description)\n\tassert.Equal(t, attachment1, variant.Attachment)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, variant.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant.CreatedAt.Seconds, variant.UpdatedAt.Seconds)\n\n\tupdated, err := s.store.UpdateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.UpdateVariantRequest{\n\t\tId:          variant.Id,\n\t\tFlagKey:     variant.FlagKey,\n\t\tKey:         variant.Key,\n\t\tName:        variant.Name,\n\t\tDescription: \"foobar\",\n\t\tAttachment:  `{\"key\":      \"value2\"}`,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant.Id, updated.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, updated.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant.FlagKey, updated.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant.Key, updated.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant.Name, updated.Name)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foobar\", updated.Description)\n\tassert.Equal(t, `{\"key\":\"value2\"}`, updated.Attachment)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, updated.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, updated.UpdatedAt)\n\n\t// get the flag again\n\tflag, err = s.store.GetFlag(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(storage.DefaultNamespace, flag.Key))\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tassert.Len(t, flag.Variants, 1)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestUpdateVariantNamespace() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := timestamps to the second and not millisecond granularity\n\t\t\t\ttime.Sleep(time.Second)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t_, err := s.store.CreateVariant(ctx, &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespace,\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      req.Key,\n\t\t\t\tKey:          fmt.Sprintf(\"variant_%d\", i),\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treq := storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(namespace),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithLimit(pageSize),\n\t\t),\n\t)\n\tresp, err := s.store.ListFlags(ctx, req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tfound := resp.Results\n\tfor token := resp.NextPageToken; token != \"\"; token = resp.NextPageToken {\n\t\treq.QueryParams.PageToken = token\n\t\tresp, err = s.store.ListFlags(ctx, req)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\tfound = append(found, resp.Results...)\n\t}\n\n\trequire.Len(t, found, totalFlags)\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < totalFlags; i++ {\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, namespace, found[i].NamespaceKey)\n\n\t\texpectedFlag := fmt.Sprintf(\"flag_%03d\", i)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, expectedFlag, found[i].Key)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", found[i].Name)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", found[i].Description)\n\n\t\trequire.Len(t, found[i].Variants, 2)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, namespace, found[i].Variants[0].NamespaceKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, expectedFlag, found[i].Variants[0].FlagKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"variant_0\", found[i].Variants[0].Key)\n\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, namespace, found[i].Variants[1].NamespaceKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, expectedFlag, found[i].Variants[1].FlagKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"variant_1\", found[i].Variants[1].Key)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite)
